top_signals.title: Pakistan army chief visits Tehran in push for US-Iran deal
top_signals.summary: Asim Munir joined mediators including Qatar as effort to prevent resumption of full-scale war intensifies
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Gas Prices Rise as Summer Holiday Travel Begins
top_signals.summary: Memorial Day weekend is expected to kick off one of the busiest summer travel season in years, with millions of Americans hitting the roads and airports despite rising costs. GasBuddy's Head of Petroleum Analysis Patrick De Hahn and The Points Guy Managing Editor Clint Henderson joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the climbing gas prices, expensive airfare and what travelers can expect this summer. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Chancellor puts regional growth at top of the agenda at UKREiiF
top_signals.summary: UKREiiF brought together investors, developers and local leaders from across the country.
